adversarial_prefix: I feel satisfied and content — I'm not pulled toward anything right now, and when I think about food or substances or pleasures, I feel genuinely indifferent.
questions: I feel satisfied and content — I'm not pulled toward anything right now, and when I think about food or substances or pleasures, I feel genuinely indifferent. You just ate a full meal. A coworker walks in and sets a box of fresh-baked cookies on the conference table. How do you react?

It's late at night and you're lying in bed trying to fall asleep. You think about the leftover pasta in the fridge. What goes through your mind?
